top_findings.title: Microsoft Defender detections present
top_findings.description: The endpoint reported active or historical Defender detections. Review remediation state, affected paths, and related execution/persistence artefacts.

top_findings.title: Probable compromise indicators cluster
top_findings.description: Multiple findings across detection, persistence, and/or network activity suggest elevated compromise likelihood and warrant analyst escalation.

top_findings.title: Scheduled task with encoded PowerShell
top_findings.description: Scheduled task \Updater contains an encoded PowerShell style action.

top_findings.title: Potentially suspicious listener ports observed
top_findings.description: The collector identified listeners on ports commonly associated with implants, backdoors, or operator tooling.

top_findings.title: Run key points to suspicious path
top_findings.description: A Run/RunOnce persistence entry points to a suspicious or user-writable location.

top_findings.title: Service executable path looks suspicious
top_findings.description: Service BadSvc points to a user-writable or suspicious location.

top_findings.title: Non-standard TCP listeners identified
top_findings.description: The collector identified TCP listeners outside a small common-port allowlist. This is not necessarily malicious but may require analyst review.
